questionHtml: Suggest how Linda might be able to reduce the error whilst still using the trapezoidal rule.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER

reduce the width of the intervals (trapezoids)                       A1

OR

increase the number of intervals (trapezoids)                       A1


Note: Accept equivalent statements. Award A0 for the ambiguous answer “increase the intervals”.

 

[1 mark]

meta.title: Suggest how Linda might be able to reduce the error whilst still using the trapezoidal rule.
